channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wooden frames, 1st June
item.description:
Wooden frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Francis Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 1st June
item.description:
Hello. Every time the grass is cut in front of lever court the drain gets blocked. The pipes are blocked. And the water from the sink and the washing machine won’t drain away.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Poole Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown front garden at 89 Shenley Road blocking pavement, 1st June
item.description:
The front garden of 89 Shenley Road is overgrown and blocking the pavement due to the position of a tree, making it impassable for pedestrians, particularly buggy users and wheelchairs. It urgently needs cutting back to allow pedestrian access to the pavement. This is separate to No91 which also has an overgrown front garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Shenley Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead black car, 1st June
item.description:
Deceased black cat
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown front garden at 91 Shenley Road blocking pavement, 1st June
item.description:
The bushes in front of the garden at 91 Shenley Road are overgrown and are now blocking the pavement, making it impassable for buggy and wheelchair users. The front garden bushes urgently need cutting back to allow pedestrian access to the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Shenley Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped scooter, 1st June
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Update on Report 9541908., 1st June
item.description:
Council have closed the case saying it's Thames Water's land. Bexley Council did the regeneration of Blacken a few years ago which involved the replacement of the pavements including this one, so how come this now belongs to Thames Water.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 246, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement and road unswept for over 4 weeks, 1st June
item.description:
Photos show logs hill unswept pavement and road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Logs Hill, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Dumped mattress between a fence and the bus stop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Edge needs trimming, 1st June
item.description:
The edge needs trimming. It looks untidy and unsightly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burma Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 seater sofa bases, white shelving,, 1st June
item.description:
2double seater sofa bases were dumped on both sides of Fairchild Place late on saturday 30th May, and on sunday (31st) white shelving added, today a large bin with tree offcuts was added. the sofas were dragged on the street obstructing traffic/deliveries

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairchild Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large blue fabric and black bin bag, 1st June
item.description:
Fly tipping here for the last day
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forest Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds growing in pavement and in shed area all over th estate, 1st June
item.description:
There are weeds growing on the pavements and also in all the fenced shed areas on burma court estate. It makes everything look shabby and this is also dislodging slabs and potentially causing trip hazards. This needs to be addressed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected dead leaves, 1st June
item.description:
Dead leaves piled at the bottom of the tree and in corner. This is unhealthy for the tree and very unsightly. People also feeling the can dump their rubbish there. Dead leaves should have been collected. They have been there for more than 6months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st June
item.description:
There is a recurring issue with fly tipping in this location, it looks as though it is being added to everyday. It is being done by people that live at this location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palace Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x wooden pallets left on pavement/pathway next to no. 220, 1st June
item.description:
2 x wooden pallets left on pavement/pathway next to no. 220
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Newington High Street, West Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree in alleyway, 1st June
item.description:
Tree has overgrown forcing people to duck right underneath to get through alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Eshan Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Dumped old fences, 1st June
item.description:
Outside number 2 and 3 Colne Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cherries from trees attracting birds, 1st June
item.description:
The Cherry trees inside Leesons Primary school overhang the school fencing, which causes birds to sit in the trees above the cars and drop cherries and droppings onto the cars below. I have spoken to the primary school, who have informed me that they are too high for them to maintain. If something could be done about this that would be great, as it is damaging the paintwork on cars. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie Bin Abandoned on Wheathill Road, 1st June
item.description:
A wheelie bin containing garden waste has been abandoned on the pavement at Wheathill Road. The bin is obstructing part of the footway and appears to have been left in a public location rather than on private property for collection. This is another example of ongoing dumping activity at this persistent flytipping hotspot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheathill Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
